content.content:
content: '# Web Document


  ## Metadata


  - title: What should I do if my tickets were lost, stolen or damaged?

  - url: https://help.ticketmaster.com/hc/en-us/articles/9756304477585-What-should-I-do-if-my-tickets-were-lost-stolen-or-damaged

  - source: Ticketmaster Help

  - domain: help.ticketmaster.com


  ## Content


  # What should I do if my tickets were lost, stolen or damaged?


  If your tickets are lost, stolen, damaged or destroyed, contact Fan Support and
  our team will be happy to help.


  Make sure you have your order number or the card you used to buy the tickets readily
  available.


  ## Need More Help?


  Contact us.

  '
metadata: {}
title: What should I do if my tickets were lost, stolen or damaged?

content: '# Web Document


  ## Metadata


  - title: How to Contact Us

  - url: https://help.ticketmaster.com/hc/en-us/articles/9605825450129-How-to-Contact-Us

  - source: Ticketmaster Help

  - domain: help.ticketmaster.com


  ## Content


  # Contact Us


  We''re here to help. For any questions, get in touch with us by email, chat or phone.


  ## Have questions? Browse our help articles


  Explore the help articles and frequently asked questions before contacting support.


  ## Already have tickets? Sign in to chat


  1. Find your order in My Tickets.

  2. Select the Chat icon.


  ## Can''t sign in and need info? Email us


  Use the email support option if you need information and cannot sign in.


  ## Want to reach us by phone? Call us


  Call 1-800-653-8000.


  Phone support hours:


  - Monday through Friday: 9 a.m. to 11:30 p.m. EST.

  - Saturday: 9 a.m. to 10 p.m. EST.

  - Sunday: 9 a.m. to 9 p.m. EST.


  To purchase tickets, visit Ticketmaster online or use the Ticketmaster app.

  '
metadata: {}
title: How to Contact Us
url: https://help.ticketmaster.com/hc/en-us/articles/9605825450129-How-to-Contact-Us

content: '# Web Document


  ## Metadata


  - title: Madison Square Garden FAQs | MSG | Official Site

  - url: https://www.msg.com/madison-square-garden/faqs

  - source: Madison Square Garden

  - domain: msg.com


  ## Content


  # Madison Square Garden FAQs


  The Madison Square Garden FAQ page provides venue information about box office hours,
  capacity, security policies and guest service.


  ## Can I bring a bag?


  Madison Square Garden asks all guests to arrive early and travel light. Bags do
  not have to be clear, but they must fit comfortably under your seat.


  Oversized bags larger than 22 inches by 14 inches by 9 inches are prohibited. Madison
  Square Garden does not provide an area to check bags, coats or other personal belongings.


  If you or someone in your party have additional needs, contact Guest Relations or
  call 212-465-6225.


  ## Are pets allowed inside The Garden?


  Only service animals are permitted inside Madison Square Garden.


  If you or a member of your party is bringing a service animal, contact Madison Square
  Garden''s Accessibility Services Department before your event. Seating locations
  that provide dedicated space for service animals are available throughout the arena.


  ## Does Madison Square Garden accept cash for purchases?


  Madison Square Garden accepts credit and debit cards or mobile payment, including
  Google Pay and Apple Pay.


  Guests who want to make a purchase with cash can use reverse ATMs located throughout
  the venue to convert cash into a debit card.


  ## Additional assistance


  For additional assistance, contact Guest Relations or call 212-465-6225. Guest Relations
  provides general venue support for guests and event-related questions.

  '
metadata: {}
title: Madison Square Garden FAQs | MSG | Official Site
url: https://www.msg.com/madison-square-garden/faqs

Because the **barcode area is damaged** and your ticket is on **Ticketmaster**, contact **Ticketmaster Fan Support before you go to Madison Square Garden**—don’t wait until you arrive. Ticketmaster specifically handles lost, stolen, or damaged tickets.

Have your **order number or the card used for the purchase** ready.

- **Sign in to Ticketmaster:** Open **My Tickets**, select the order, and use the **Chat** icon: [Ticketmaster Contact Us](https://help.ticketmaster.com/hc/en-us/articles/9605825450129-How-to-Contact-Us)
- **Phone:** **1-800-653-8000**
  - Mon–Fri: 9 a.m.–11:30 p.m. EST  
  - Sat: 9 a.m.–10 p.m. EST  
  - Sun: 9 a.m.–9 p.m. EST  

Ticketmaster’s damaged-ticket guidance: [What to do if tickets are lost, stolen, or damaged](https://help.ticketmaster.com/hc/en-us/articles/9756304477585-What-should-I-do-if-my-tickets-were-lost-stolen-or-damaged)

Madison Square Garden Guest Relations is for general venue support, but Ticketmaster is the right first contact for a damaged Ticketmaster barcode.

final_answer:
Because the **barcode area is damaged** and your ticket is on **Ticketmaster**, contact **Ticketmaster Fan Support before you go to Madison Square Garden**—don’t wait until you arrive. Ticketmaster specifically handles lost, stolen, or damaged tickets.

Have your **order number or the card used for the purchase** ready.

- **Sign in to Ticketmaster:** Open **My Tickets**, select the order, and use the **Chat** icon: [Ticketmaster Contact Us](https://help.ticketmaster.com/hc/en-us/articles/9605825450129-How-to-Contact-Us)
- **Phone:** **1-800-653-8000**
  - Mon–Fri: 9 a.m.–11:30 p.m. EST  
  - Sat: 9 a.m.–10 p.m. EST  
  - Sun: 9 a.m.–9 p.m. EST  

Ticketmaster’s damaged-ticket guidance: [What to do if tickets are lost, stolen, or damaged](https://help.ticketmaster.com/hc/en-us/articles/9756304477585-What-should-I-do-if-my-tickets-were-lost-stolen-or-damaged)

Madison Square Garden Guest Relations is for general venue support, but Ticketmaster is the right first contact for a damaged Ticketmaster barcode.
